import json, re, unicodedata, sys, os, math, itertools, difflib

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = load_json('/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json')
hadith = load_json('/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json')

len(quran), len(hadith)[:3] if isinstance(hadith, list) else hadith.keys()
type(quran), (list(quran.keys()) if isinstance(quran, dict) else len(quran)), type(hadith), (list(hadith.keys()) if isinstance(hadith, dict) else len(hadith))

# Build normalization
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
def normalize(s):
    if s is None: return ''
    s = re.sub(r'[ـ]', '', s)  # tatweel
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

target = "فَأَمَّا مَنْ آتَى رَبَّهُ وَقَلْبُهُ مُطْمَئِنٌّ بِالإِيمَانِ فَأُوْلَئِكَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ"
norm_target = normalize(target)
norm_target

# Try partial tokens search
tokens = norm_target.split()

for i,item in enumerate(quran):
    text = get_text_ayah(item)
    n = normalize(text)
    overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in n)
    if overlap >= 3:  # some overlap
        cands.append((overlap, i, text, n))
cands_sorted = sorted(cands, reverse=True)[:20]
[(o, i) for o,i,_,_ in cands_sorted][:10]

# Check top overlaps containing 'فاوليك في جنات' or similar

res[:10]

for o,i,text in sorted(hcands, reverse=True)[:5]:
    print(o, i, text[:300], '\n---\n')

phrase = "وَقَلْبُهُ مُطْمَئِنٌّ بِالْإِيمَانِ"
norm_phrase = normalize(phrase)
cands=[]
for i,item in enumerate(quran):
    text = get_text_ayah(item)
    if norm_phrase in normalize(text):
        cands.append((i, text))
